repair_memory_selection.selection_rationale: The current failure (ca6k_00449) shows two error types: (1) 'cannot convert const gert::StorageShape* to const gert::Shape*' from context->GetInputShape(0) in TilingFunc, and (2) TilingData members like totalLength, tileLength, blockDim, C, H, W are not directly accessible (compiler suggests getters). Memory id 6e9b566c (ca6k_00333) and b0fabc43 (ca6k_00343) address exactly the StorageShape-to-Shape conversion in TilingFunc for ca6k operators. Memory id 84bb2c98 (ca6k_00188) and 0ed87544 (ca6k_00397) describe 'no member named set_*' errors for tiling data and advise using direct member assignment – relevant because the current code attempts direct assignment but fails, indicating a different field naming convention (underscore suffix). Memory id 5014fe8c (ca6k_00266) covers both the StorageShape/Shape mismatch and GetOriginShape pitfalls, providing a comprehensive hint for fixing the host tiling code. All chosen memories are from the same torch#1 category and similar ca6k op family, making them directly applicable.
